data.title: [RegulatoryUpdate] Hong Kong to Announce 2026/2027 Budget with Focus on Virtual Assets
data.description:
The Hong Kong government is set to announce the 2026/2027 fiscal budget on February 25, with a focus on virtual assets and investor protection. According to ChainCatcher, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Professionals Association stated that the city has completed the initial regulatory infrastructure for virtual assets. The next step should be to focus on the commercialization and practical application of these assets.

Efforts to enhance Hong Kong's position as a global virtual asset hub include improving secondary market liquidity for real-world assets, expediting product approvals, introducing international liquidity, and strengthening professional training. These initiatives aim to transform Hong Kong from a market with clear regulations into one with abundant liquidity and widespread application, aligning with the national "15th Five-Year Plan" for financial openness and digital economy strategy.

data.title: [ContractVulnerability] Suspicious Transactions Detected on SynapLogicon Contracts
data.description: CertiK Alert has identified 193 suspicious transactions related to SynapLogicon contracts. According to Foresight News, attackers repeatedly used new addresses to call 0x670a3267, utilizing flash loans to mint 16,000 SYP tokens with 1 ETH before reclaiming the ETH.

data.title: [FundFlows] Moon Dark Side Nears Completion of New Funding Round
data.description:
Moon Dark Side is finalizing a new funding round with a pre-investment valuation of $4.8 billion. According to Foresight News, the completion of this funding round is expected soon. The company has not yet commented on the current financing.

Previously, Foresight News reported that Moon Dark Side secured $500 million in a Series C funding round last December. IDG led the investment with $150 million, while existing shareholders such as Alibaba, Tencent, and Wang Huiwen made additional contributions, bringing the post-investment valuation to $4.3 billion.

data.title: [GovernanceProposal] Injective's Governance Proposal IIP-617 Receives Overwhelming Approval
data.description: Injective's governance proposal IIP-617 has been overwhelmingly approved, with 99.89% of community members voting in favor. According to ChainCatcher, this proposal has been enacted immediately, significantly reducing the total supply of INJ tokens. This move positions INJ as one of the most deflationary assets in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: The crypto market rebounded after a period of volatility, with the RWA sector rising 2.38%, while only the NFT and SocialFi sectors declined.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market as a whole is showing a fluctuating upward trend, with the RWA sector performing particularly well, rising 2.38% in the last 24 hours. Specifically, Sky (SKY) rose 1.90%, Ondo Finance (ONDO) rose 2.74%, and Pendle (PENDLE) rose 5.52%. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) are both trading within a narrow range, at $92,000 and $3,200 respectively. In other sectors, the AI ​​sector rose 2.06% in the last 24 hours, with Kite (KITE) up 7.79%; the Meme sector rose 1.80%, with MemeCore (M) up 3.61%; the PayFi sector rose 1.30%, with Safe (SAFE) up 4.27%; the Layer 1 sector rose 0.97%, with Cosmos Hub (ATOM) up 4.10%; the CeFi sector rose 0.83%, with Binance Coin (BNB) up 1.69%; the DeFi sector rose 0.75%, with River (RIVER) continuing its upward trend at 15.72%; and the Layer 2 sector rose 0.47%, with SOON (SOON) up 10.83%. Conversely, the NFT sector fell 0.22%, and the SocialFi sector fell 1.61%. The crypto sector indices, which reflect the historical performance of the sector, show that the ssiMeme, ssiRWA, and ssiAI indices rose by 1.36%, 1.36%, and 1.05%, respectively.

data.title: [TokenTransfer] Significant TON Transfer from Kiln to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 10:10, a total of 1,316,100 TON tokens were transferred from Kiln to an anonymous address starting with Ef9Copper. Subsequently, this address moved the same amount of TON tokens to another location.

data.title: Bitget launches VIP-exclusive USDT flexible investment account with up to 10% APR.
data.description: Bitget launches a VIP-exclusive USDT flexible investment product. During the promotion period, VIP users can subscribe to USDT in the "Earn Money Easily" section and enjoy up to 10% APR. The flexible interest rate will be adjusted in real time according to market conditions, and the final subscription rate is subject to the information displayed on the official website. For more details, please visit the Bitget official platform.

FET traders continue to accumulate despite the onset of a sharp price decline.

data.title: A whale that once profited $14.26 million has accumulated 13,700 ETH and is currently experiencing a paper loss of $216,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x3c9e...f757) that previously profited $14.26 million by buying low and selling high with WBTC has accumulated 13,700 ETH since January 1, 2026, with a total value of $43.91 million. Four hours ago, this address withdrew another 1,000 ETH from Kraken and deposited them all into Aave as margin. The average price of this ETH holding is $3,205, and it currently has a floating loss of $216,000.

Most U. S. tariffs are paid by American consumers and businesses, not foreign sellers.

data.title: Trove will switch development from Hyperliquid to Solana; Trove shares opened down 97%.
data.description: Trove has announced it will no longer be built on Hyperliquid, but will instead rebuild its perpetual contract DEX on Solana. Previously, the project raised over $11.5 million for its Hyperliquid integration, but due to a liquidity partner withdrawing 500,000 HYPE tokens, the team decided to reserve approximately $9.4 million for Solana development, stating this was the only way to keep the project alive. Trove has already refunded approximately $2.44 million to some investors and plans to refund $100,000 to ICO participants. On-chain data shows that the TROVE token plummeted by over 97% within 10 minutes of TGE, dropping to $0.0008, and its market capitalization fell from $20 million to less than $1 million. Furthermore, Bubblemaps monitoring showed that an entity acquired 12% of the token supply through 80 new wallets, but there is currently no evidence linking it to the team. In response to community concerns, Trove stated it will not abscond and will regain trust through subsequent actions.

data.title: A cybersecurity engineer was accused of stealing funds from a gambling website; police in two locations seized 183 bitcoins.
data.description: Cybersecurity engineer Li Dong has been prosecuted by the Changge City Procuratorate in Henan Province for allegedly exploiting program vulnerabilities to steal the personal information of over 1.84 million Chinese citizens from the overseas gambling website "Kaiyun Sports," and using technical means to steal agent commissions totaling over 35.5 million yuan. He is accused of theft and infringement of citizens' personal information. Previously, police in Zhangjiajie, Hunan Province, and Changge, Henan Province, had filed cases against Li Dong for allegedly operating a gambling den. Zhangjiajie police seized 103 bitcoins from him, which were converted into over 49.61 million yuan. Henan police seized 80 bitcoins from him, with a market value exceeding 40 million yuan. The case is currently being heard in the Changge City Court, with the defense lawyer arguing for acquittal. The court will schedule another hearing at a later date. (The Paper)

data.title: [MarketSentiment] NFT Market Continues to Attract Wealthy Collectors, Says Animoca Brands Co-Founder
data.description: NFTs remain popular among affluent collectors, according to Animoca Brands co-founder Yat Siu. During an interview at the CfC St. Moritz cryptocurrency conference, Siu emphasized the long-term value of NFTs as core assets. According to Foresight News, Siu affirmed that NFTs are still favored by wealthy collectors, drawing parallels to the resonance among Picasso collectors. Despite an 80% decline in his personal NFT portfolio, Siu noted that these assets were never intended for short-term gains.

data.title: A trader aggressively rolled over a $200 million short position in both BTC and ETH, with the BTC short position only $1,600 away from the liquidation price.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, during the market decline at 7 AM today, a trader (0xd83...8fd7) shorted 510 BTC, worth $47.3 million, bringing their total short position to $200 million. Currently, this trader holds short positions in 1073 BTC, worth $100 million, with an opening price of $92,469 and a liquidation price of $94,384, resulting in a floating loss of $280,000; and short positions in 31,093 ETH, worth $100 million, with an opening price of $3,270 and a liquidation price of $3,246, resulting in a floating profit of $2.49 million. The trader's BTC short positions are only $1600 away from their liquidation prices, and their ETH short positions are only $56 away from their liquidation prices.

data.title:

data.title: [TokenTransfer] FG Nexus Sells 2,500 ETH
data.description: FG Nexus, an Ethereum treasury company, has sold 2,500 ETH. According to Foresight News, this transaction occurred four hours ago. FG Nexus had previously accumulated 50,770 ETH at an average price of $3,944 between August and September last year. The company still holds 37,594 ETH.

data.title: [OnChainMovement] Dormant Bitcoin Address Awakens After 13 Years
data.description:
A Bitcoin address inactive for 13 years has recently transferred its entire holdings to a new wallet. According to ChainCatcher, the address, known as a Bitcoin OG, moved 909.38 BTC, valued at $84.62 million, after years of dormancy.

When the address first received Bitcoin 13 years ago, the price per BTC was under $7, marking an approximate 13,900-fold increase in value since then.
